title: The Geechee Witch: A Boo Hag Story
original_title: The Geechee Witch: A Boo Hag Story
overview: After her mother-in-law is mysteriously killed, Leah and her husband relocate from Harlem to his family's estate in coastal Georgia, where she discovers a Boo Hag has been unleashed on her family, determined to take her life.
